description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a metallic valve assembly and a black discharge horn at the top. The body features a large, yellow rectangular label on one side and a white and red instructional label on the front, both providing operational and safety information. The top section includes a black handle and lever mechanism for activation, as well as a visible safety pin with a ring for tamper prevention. The discharge horn is wide and conical, attached directly to the valve, and is made of black plastic. The extinguisher is constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with plastic and rubber components for the handle and nozzle. Its overall appearance is typical of portable fire extinguishers found in urban environments such as garages, hallways, and public buildings.
description: A red metal fire extinguisher with a black discharge horn, metallic valve, and visible safety pin, featuring prominent instructional and information labels.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is seen from the side, showing the yellow information label and the circular end of the black discharge horn.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front with the main instructional label, the black discharge horn, and the handle and safety pin assembly.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the extinguisher, with the black discharge horn and handle visible, and the white and red label partially seen.
description_view_3: A side angle showing the metallic valve, black handle, and the conical discharge horn, with the yellow label partially visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Two visible labels: a large yellow rectangular label on the side and a white and red instructional label on the front, both with text and symbols.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black, conical discharge horn is attached to the valve at the top, made of plastic and positioned horizontally.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin with a circular pull ring is visible at the top near the handle.
